entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in Xince and Xodel successful, version 1.0. - xodel
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform

[xule:error] rule add_facts_to_instance: Rule: add_facts_to_instance - Property 'name' is not a property of a 'string'. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1065696/000106569623000064/lkq-20230630.htm

[xule:error] rule labels: Rule has run too many iterations, either remove catesian products in the rule or the instance or increase the iterations using --xule-max-rule-iterations option. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1065696/000106569623000064/lkq-20230630.htm
